name: Austerlitz: Napoleon's Greatest Victory — Tier 0 free play (no rules enforced)

grid.provenance: hexgrid-direct (flat-top mapping validated on Westwall/Arnhem); module numbering: first=H hType=N vType=N hOff=8 vOff=-1 stagger=false — hex LABELS unverified, geometry is what matters for Tier 0

sides.note: Counter sheets are army sheets: Sheet 1 = French (blue infantry, verified visually), Sheet 2 = Allied (Russian names Bagration/Vorpatzki, verified visually). Stragglers fall to default Allied.

stats.provenance: UNVERIFIED placeholder MA for free-play highlighting only — no rules learned (Tier 0)

movement.note: Tier 0: uniform 1 MP, no ZOC, no terrain — piece pushing, not rules

game.title: Austerlitz: Napoleon's Greatest Victory (Great Battles of the Napoleonic Wars, Vol. I)
game.art: Mark Simonitch (map art); Rodger B. MacGowan (counter art)

module.title: Austerlitz 1.0.0 (VASSAL module)
module.contributors: Mark Simonitch (original art for counters and maps, per library credits)
module.source: the module's own readme + the module library listing

credits.note: This is a Tier-0 free-play conversion: no rules are enforced or claimed. All game content remains the property of GMT Games; all module art and data remain the work of the module author above. Bring-your-own-module: the module is downloaded by each user from the VASSAL module library, never redistributed here.

rules_docs.note: GMT hosts these free; local copies in literature/austerlitz (gitignored).
